arts.ttl: Guardiola and Begiristain get £75m Man City transfer message amid Khusanov and Echeverri predictions
arts.sum: Manchester City marched on in the FA Youth Cup as they navigated a quarter-final clash vs West Brom at the Hawthorns.

arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher says Arsenal have 'peaked' under Mikel Arteta as he backs Liverpool and Man City to fight it out for the title next season
arts.sum: Jamie Carragher believes Arsenal have gone as far as they can under manager Mikel Arteta.

arts.ttl: ‘It’s similar to Enron’: La Liga president accuses Manchester City of financial deception
arts.sum: Enron one of the largest bankruptcy cases in US history La Liga alleges City distort EU’s internal market Manchester City have been accused of an Enron-style financial deception by the La Liga president, Javier Tebas. Tebas said the Spanish league filed a complaint against City to the European Commission in the summer of 2023, which he says the Commission is investigating. City have not commented on Tebas’ allegations but club sources are aware of them, and strongly refute them. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola hails impact of 'extraordinary' January signing
arts.sum: Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola has revealed that one of the club’s many January signings has already had a major impact and is "incredible" in the dressing room.

arts.ttl: Man City 'strongly refute' allegations of breaching EU competition law as La Liga president Javier Tebas confirms legal complaint
arts.sum: Man City reportedly 'strongly refute' allegations of breaching EU competition law after La Liga president Javier Tebas confirmed that the Spanish league have filed a legal complaint against the Premier League champions to the EU Commission.

arts.ttl: “We want Manchester City to be sanctioned” – La Liga president Javier Tebas
arts.sum: Manchester City have been one of the most widely-discussed football teams on the planet in recent years, particularly in regards to financial matters. The Cityzens are currently under investigation by the Premier League over an alleged 115 breaches of Financial Fair Play rules, and more claims have also been made. La Liga president Javier Tebas […] The post “We want Manchester City to be sanctioned” – La Liga president Javier Tebas appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Julian Alvarez reveals final conversation with Pep Guardiola after rift claims from Man City exit
arts.sum: Former Manchester City forward Julian Alvarez has revealed his feelings towards Pep Guardiola and his two years at the club

arts.ttl: Man City face FURTHER legal action after complaint by La Liga
arts.sum: Speaking to journalists at The Financial Times’ Business of Football summit on Thursday, Tebas said that La Liga had filed a complaint with the European Commission in July 2023, with the situation ‘worrying’ him more than City’s dispute over associated party transaction (APT) rules. La Liga president Javier Tebas has accused Manchester City of breaching European Union Competition Law and that a formal complaint has been filed against the Premier League giants.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou explains why Tottenham stars were benched for Man City loss
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur manager Ange Postecoglou forcefully insisted that he was well within his rights to rotate his squad for the defeat to Manchester City.

arts.ttl: Man City respond as La Liga ‘file legal complaint’ against Premier League champions
arts.sum: Man City strongly refute claims of financial deception made by La Liga president Javier Tebas
